ai_summary: AJOONI BIOTECH LIMITED will hold its 16th Annual General Meeting to approve a significant 40% increase in its Authorized Share Capital from Rs. 50 crore to Rs. 70 crore, enabling substantial future equity issuance. Concurrently, the company proposes a preferential allotment of 90 lakh equity shares, valued at Rs. 3.87 crore, to its promoter, Healthy Biosciences Limited, at an issue price of Rs. 4.30 per share. This preferential issue provides a capital injection but warrants scrutiny regarding the fairness of the issue price relative to market value, as it could dilute existing minority shareholders.
